text: AI is reshaping the modern workplace in remarkable ways. Through automation, routine and repetitive tasks—like data entry and scheduling—are now handled by machines, freeing up employees for more creative work. Productivity tools, such as smart assistants and project management software, help workers analyse information faster and make better decisions. However, rather than replacing humans, the trend is toward human-AI collaboration, where people and algorithms combine their strengths. This means many jobs are changing: new roles in AI oversight and training are emerging, while others require workers to learn new skills. Adapting to these shifts is essential for future career success.
